findings.summary: JAMMA arcade interface (25 components). Multi-project schematic duplication: analyzer includes ALL project instances instead of filtering to target project (56 counted vs 25 actual). Zero signal detections correct for passive I/O buffer design.

incorrect.description: Component count inflated from 25 actual to 56 reported - analyzer includes all project instances instead of filtering to target project

suggestions: Filter schematic analysis to target project only in multi-project repos
